ItacPersonItem.Notes: In 1634 he read his first discourse in the Addormentati Academy: Lagrime per la morte della Signora Emila Adorni Raggi. On the dates, see Tomasinelli Gallo, Anton Giulio Brignole Sale..., in La Berio, 12 (1973), pp. 65-74. Sale was Prince of the Addormentati Academy, where he played a key role.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
